prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen portrait still of an elegant vintage blonde woman leaning against a wall in a dim interior, framed on the left third with large negative space to the right. She has a dramatic 1960s bouffant hairstyle in platinum blonde, bare shoulders, gold jewelry including one chunky gold necklace, one visible gold ring, and one earring, and she holds exactly one lit white cigarette near her cheek with faint smoke drifting upward. Place a flat opaque square censor block over her face, centered from forehead to chin, in muted dark brown. The background is an out-of-focus teal-green wall or window surface with strong diagonal shadows and moody noir atmosphere. Use low-key cinematic lighting with warm highlights on skin and hair, cool green shadows, shallow depth of field, film grain, realistic texture, anamorphic movie-still composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, no text, no watermark.
